title: Rename device - Cancel
scenario: Device name reverts to official name when Cancel is pressed after editing in Device Settings > General
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Tap on the device name field to edit it
Enter a new name (e.g., 'My Poly Device')
Tap the Cancel button (or back/close without saving)
expected: The device name should remain unchanged (the official name should still be displayed).
